response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have one brief C++ role at National Instruments, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or cloud platform development required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems.
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring through workshops and code kata sessions.
Extensive exposure to event-driven architectures, CI/CD, and DevOps tooling in distributed environments.
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience beyond a 6-month role 10 years ago.
Lacks demonstrated expertise in industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), MQTT, REST for IoT, or real-time embedded systems.
No evidence of cloud platform (Azure) or industrial automation domain experience required for the role.
